MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Patricia H. Lyon, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: United Commerical Bank

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff United Commerical Bank's application for a writ of possession is granted. No opposition has been filed. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
